reviews.review_description: I love this game but is getting a little boring cause nothing new is coming out so could you guys please if you could add more stuff? like new cards like in explosive kittens 2

I wonder what my EU rights are about this. You sell a game, yet you fail to make servers robust enough. This has been happening for about a week or more.  I have tried on my child's profile and on mine--same thing happens. The error messagge is NOT helpful. What is going on with your servers and your company?

They sell a game that would of be popular is they have a working multiplayer, and why is the game still on Vr if it doesn’t work atoll. You see I love exploding kittens and when I heard a Vr version was coming I was so exited to play it, but then I realised it’s just a none worth it of 8£
This game is very good, but I feel they should add more modes like Zombie Kittens or Exploding Kittens, good versus evil, but I feel like everything is good
The multiplayer does not work and no updates in a year do not waste money

If you can't play multiplayer for this title it needs to be removed from the app store. This is a multiplayer game, and was advertised as such at the time of purchase. It's dirty pool for meta to list a game as having multiplayer, put it on sale to incentivize purchase, and for it to end up being a waste of money and space on your quest headset. Shame on you, Meta Horizon.

Like the graphics are good the sound effects are amazing and the one star rating is fake I could play multi-player and the animation is cool BTW reply and say this review is fake not me that one star rating that says I could not play multi-player. he's dumb!!!

While we love multiple versions of Exploding Kittens, this electronic version is not ready for prime time. Many times we witnessed certain penalties being executed more than once or not at all. Reverse and skip do not work. Basic functions like round the world play work, but all other do not.
pritty good but not that much people play but i love it 100.1❤️

This is a good game however updates have stopped but not the support itself the devs of this game. Replied to a review recently  which was 13 days ago from now. The player said multiplayer had an issue and the devs fixed it. While the game is not getting any updates it may be getting bug and fixes just not content updates itself.  And the game is really fun to play it is worth your money  if your up for an exciting card game in VR.

Amazing game I love how it was adapted from card game to VR but please add in some cards from the original card game and the expansions like "mark", "streaking kitten", "imploding kitten", "curse of the cat butt" all those and maybe bigger lobbies and more game tables because I feel like 3 classic game tables aren't enough and maybe other game modes
This game is very good because you get to go in a private room and there are different game modes that are really fun like blitz’s it were you get one 2 dufuse and two explode kittens
Servers are still on (24/02/26) Great if you have friends and create a room.. really well done and great fun!

I absolutely love this game and highly recommend it to everyone! It's the perfect combination of being incredibly cute and genuinely fun to play. The graphics are nice, and the gameplay is engaging, and room gives a nice relaxed hangout vibe. It's the kind of game you can pick up for a few minutes or lose yourself in for hours. You will learn the rules quickly.

listen this game is good at all i will still put it at five stars but the server shut down so now you can't play only thing you can play is um practice mode back in the day it was fun like it was so good that i was like wow
The only buttons you need on this game is the grip button yet controllers are required. Why is there no hand tracking when there is no controls in the game.
The game does not work. Hub 1 error when trying to play.

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you for letting us know about this! We have fixed the issue and you should be able to play multiplayer again.

reviews.review_title: I think you can play public games now
reviews.review_description: i joined a public hub and there was a other person there and we played a game so public games are back!

DO NOT BUY THIS AS IT IS NOW A WASTE OF MONEY, THEY ENDED THE SUPPORT FOR THIS GAME.

it was so good as well
Good game but I want hand tracking

reviews.review_title: Wow - VR gaming at it’s finest
reviews.review_description:
I had no idea what to expect with this game - redeemed it on Horizon+ for the heck of it.

It’s one of the highest quality VR games I’ve played. The graphics are crisp, the tutorial voiceover work is fantastic, the menus, animation, gameplay - everything is top tier.

You can tell a lot of hard work and love went into this game. It’s also just plain fun. I went from having no idea what it was to playing frequently. Also recommended to friends. 

To the developers - thank you for creating such an enjoyable experience, and I hope you consider future support and enhancements.

I got to see cat explode and a cat barf rainbows

All in all peak
Was a fun game for a while, but now you just get stuck in the lobby for Hub 1. Don’t buy, it no longer works.

developer_response.body: Hello! Everything should now be back up and running, as we have fixed the issue that you ran into.

reviews.review_description: Not worth the full price. Only pay $5 max for this. There is very little content. Not a very big player base so it’s crucial you have your own people to play with .If you enjoy the irl card game you will probably enjoy this as well.

reviews.review_title: The bots are the problemThe bots are the
reviews.review_description:
I was playing this game and the lobby was full so I was gonna play against spots, but it was so hard to beat them and I’m not like a bad player at this game. I’m pretty decent and I didn’t even win five of the games. Please make it with the bots are easier or you can switch the difficulty 
￼
It’s not the best. though I like the characters

I like it alot it's unique. I never played exploding kittens before. I'm glad I got to try it free with the Quest+ subscription cuz I just read these negative reviews about no support. 
That would explain why I had to play with Ai bots cuz there was no one in the actual rooms to play against. 
There is a glitch where if the Ai bot tries to steal but you have no items to steal then it doesn't move on. You're forced to quit. 
Still fun though.
How to play it?

developer_response.body: Hello! We have fixed the issue that was blocking you from accessing it. You should be good to go now.

reviews.review_description: Why do people hate the game? It is honestly one of my favorites and I would love to play again. The thing about the game is how it uses its cards so perfectly that you can see the details they put. I will hope that people will change there minds. crossing my fingers ❤️ 😃
W game

reviews.review_title: Best if you've played the card game
reviews.review_description:
People hating on this game in the reviews probably haven't played the card game before. I agree the icons do make it a bit harder, especially for someone who has never played the card game.
This is a pretty fun game and would highly recommend it to anyone that has played the card game. If you haven't played before there is a learning curve to figure out how it works
I am in love with this game best game that you can get on vr in my opinion

What an absolute gem of a game!  As an adult i enjoyed this with friends, great graphics, great game overall. So much fun, definitely a good one for when you're on the 🍻😂
Devs have done good, would highly recommend for friends and family!
So good!!! Its so fun playing with friends and strangers its so grate, but somtimes people can somtimes say bad things i dont recommend this game for small children
I love this card game even funnier on vr
Its an amazing game you should give it a try but sadly i havent Seen new content in a while (Exept Skins) So i dont think it will get any Updates .
They turned my favorite card game into a vr game. This game has a lot more then just the card game like arcade games wheel spin and more! I love this game a lot
I cant join the game

developer_response.body: Hi! This issue is now resolved and you should be able to join games again.

reviews.review_description: I don’t even need to explain this game=heaven
The game is so fun and good I love playing with my friends and other people  :D￼

It would require more game cards like the implosive kitten or spotted kitten expansions.
That's why I don't give 5 stars.
W game i don't even need to explain

This game is done. No more support and no expansions or updates will be happening. Last month, they were talking about doing great things, and they just announced that they will no longer be supporting it.

Additionally, in the description, it says that you can customize your avatar. You absolutely cannot do that. You can buy your choice of avatars, but there is no customization. 

With no future and no support, I am sorry that I purchased this game and wished that it was not too late for a refund. There is a good version in VR chat that has many more cards than this. ￼￼ 

They didn’t even give it a chance. This is so disappointing.

Best game, though it's sad that no expansions are happening, BUT IT'S GOOD AND VERY DETAILED!
BUY IT!

The game would be amazing if they left the multiplayer up, but as it is you can only play with AI. It’s still pretty fun, but without the social aspect, it loses a bit of its charm. Very disappointing.

developer_response.body: Hi there, we have the multiplayer back up and running now. Thank you for your patience as we worked to resolve this matter.

reviews.review_description:
Not going to lie, but for support to be ending when the game hasnt even been out for a year is upsetting.

Not all the cosmetics are even in place with a "comming soon" place holder sign in the  customisation options. ever since launch.

The game lacks cards that are found in the free versions found in VRchat made by the community.

One min the developers are hinting that there are working on new DLC and next we hear that they are ending support for the game.

I cant really recommend the title outside of getting it for free.

Its made me caution of supporting anything by Saber interactive (shame as I like their flat world war z game)

reviews.review_title: don’t buy nd i want a refund.
reviews.review_description: Edit: really disappointed that they’re ending support on this game. i pre-ordered it and everything with a gift card that i got on a special occasion because i really thought this would go somewhere and that it would be really good. one day they say there’s a bright future ahead of this game and that they’re gonna come out with tons of new cosmetics and game modes and DLCs then the next they’re shutting down and ending support for the game. so disappointing. The fact that this game hasn’t even been out for A YEAR and it’s already been given up on is disappointing. you really made the exploding kittens community sad with this one. don’t buy it.

I was gifted this game by a friend and we all had a good time, but the game was clearly unfinished. The AI was rough, which might not be the worst if you have friends, but they cheat so badly! The cosmetics were few and the game could be grinded by playing a duel with an AI speedrunning a loss and repeating that 10 times to gamble with. With its flaws, I figured it would get better over time, but to hear they are dropping support is disappointing. The VR games scene is already full of shovelware, glorified mobile games, so it was refreshing to have a standalone version of the VR chat game with little balls and models instead of cards. Now that it will be abandoned, it will join the ranks with the other forgotten games, when it couldve been so much more. I am thankful for my friends for playing with me, and especially the good friend who got me this game, but man i wish she'd be able to get her money back. We're all immensely disappointed in these developers and hope they change their mind, but we all know they won't. They made their money, and are dumping the game to make more elsewhere. Really setting a good example for this fledgling industry, guys.   -v-

Everyone should own this game, it's like a end of night game that you can help but keep playing. Relaxing sat down, funny and you can be very sneaky. Barrel of laughs with your mates. My wife loves it I bought her a VR so we can play together.


Developers: The only bug found is that sometimes an item cannot be grabbed.
Between the reviews that they're discontinuing support and that there is seemingly no teleport movement I cant even play the game. Oh well.
I've heard a lot of talk regarding new expansions and they already dropped support. I'd get a refund if I could. Really disappointed in the recent news

reviews.review_title: If you ending the game give me my money
reviews.review_description: SINCE YOU WANNA END MY FAVORITE GAME GIMME MY MONEY BACK PLEASE
As a fan of the physical games and expansions, I had to get this in VR and get my friends hooked on it. Hoping we see some further development to add the NSFW pack perhaps.

I was a little bored and looking for something to play didn’t think this game would be great when I watched a couple videos on it but when I gave it a chance and bought it one sale turned out to be one of the most fun vr games I’ve played I highly recommend buying this game it was worth every penny. I look forward to future updates with the game. The people in the game are very friendly as well.

I had heard of Exploding Kittens but I had no idea what the game was about, watched a couple YouTube videos and decided to try this out. Wow, am I surprised, it's easily become one of my favourite games in VR and I play it most nights. It's a great competitive game that mixes strategy and luck and it is so much fun to play with others or even the AI bots. I find that lobbies are busier in the evenings and it's easy to fill a full table of 5! LOVE THIS, 10/10. 

For Devs: the only bug I've encountered is at times "do me a favour" tool appears on the side but I cannot pick it up or interact with it. Another is sometimes I see "2x" above where a tool is supposed to be but it's invisible and I cannot use the 2x tool.

I saw the trailer.  To be honest I wasn’t that impressed, but a lot of good reviews so I decided to purchase during the holiday sales.

This is an extremely fun game well worth the full price and a steal on sale!

I like that you can enter lobbies and communicate with players if you don’t want to talk.  The mini games are fun, and you can have an entertaining game with only 2 people or ai bots!

reviews.review_title: Needs to be a NSFW verson
reviews.review_description: It's fun but as you can expect there are way to many kids. I suggest a NSFW verson (much like the real alternative verson of the card game) for the older players. Or atleast make lobbies that are specific to age ranges. (Ask the players age when starting up the game then sort into like minded players)
This was a great game

reviews.review_title: WAAAAYY better than the card game
reviews.review_description: At first when I downloaded this game, I thought it would be boring, but I couldn’t have ever been more wrong. This game was so exciting and fun and there’s barely anything I would want to change about. I love the actions that you need to do for each card and how nice the community. The only thing I would change about this game is I would add more game modes, maybe add the good versus evil or zombies version of exploding kittens into this game to give it an even more exciting. Feel other than that. This game is incredible and if you don’t own it right now go to your phone and spam bye now ￼ button in 25,000 times until it goes through ￼. and if you don’t, I will come at night and haunt you ￼

Fun version of the card game with good graphics and addictive playability. Not sure what's happening with the online multilayer hub, sometimes it's full and other days everywhere is empty which makes me wonder if this is  a problem within the game. As mentioned on other reviews there seem to be a few bugs with the AI gameplay but nothing that shouldn't be ironed out in future updates.

the game, the colors. the environment is all very nice BUT THERE IS A HUGE PROBLEM!! an app like this must be based on ONLINE MULTIPLAYER WHICH IS TOTALLY ABSENT!! no random online and no private rooms with friends.
if you buy this game you must know that you will play ONLY AGAINST THE PC BOTS!

Great game and one of the most relaxing. I just hope they keep supporting the game by adding more cards and modes. The only downfall will be if they don't keep supporting the game by adding more content. Otherwise it's the perfect game to relax with after a long day at work.

We only use private lobby and its very difficult to enter the room code and open the door without accidently brushing the enter code thing which makes the code go back to 000 and you have to start again. All 4 people I've had try it have the same issue. Could use some more game modes/cards. Other than that its a good game.

Great game if you are new to exploding kittens cars game. But for those who own the actual card game at home and the expansions like I do this vr version is missing those cards and is just a base card game. Yes there are other cards you can unlock after spending hours of time getting tickets to redeem them. However there is just one location to explore and it's very small. It needs more areas to go to like for example:
A spaceship exploring the kitten universe 

Just more dlc or expansions In general it's not worth the full price it should have been sold for $4.99 because of how plain it is so far. 

Yes it's fun but is lacking content and could also be improved with vr hand tracking as an option for players with the meta quest 3/3s etc.

reviews.review_title: Don’t be deceived by the trailer
reviews.review_description: This game is super fun and hilarious. The trailer makes the game look pretty underwhelming but thankfully The game is super good.
This game would be really fun if I could join a public so I go in the hub and there is no one I reset my still no one please help

reviews.review_title: Great Game for a Fun Night
reviews.review_description: This game is really fun to play with your friends and let chaos reign with strategy and deception! If you want to see how it plays out just look up "VR Central" on YouTube!

reviews.review_title: Fun But Needs Option For Private Lobbies
reviews.review_description:
So, I tried this last night in advance of my husband downloading it so we could play together. I did the tutorial and enjoyed playing with the AI Bots even! 

He hates social lobbies filled with yelling kids and we were hoping we could just set up a game from the home hub and start a private game, but it doesn’t seem to be an option…? I don’t want to play with strangers. I don’t want to wander around the lobby listening to children babbling. Please give us an option like Walkabout MiniGolf where you can create a private lobby for friends only. We’ll hold off on purchasing that second copy until this is implemented.

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thank you for the feedback; we will have private lobbies available in a future update. :)

reviews.review_title: When it was working, was super fun (bug)
reviews.review_description:
My friend wasn't able to press the button to be able to start her march for a few hours, she tried everything but the button on the table wasn't lighting up and initiating her turn, after exiting the game and restarting her headset and messing with the settings, we were stumped, 

When this bug is addressed and fixed, it will be one of our favorites,

I LOVE exploding kittens and I own every card, so as soon as this came out i was very excited. Though only having 5 different actions and 5 different cat cards can get a bit boring. I do hope an update including cards from the 1st expansion or new cards that would normally only be able to be done on vr would also be cool like the fake shuffle from the mobile edition. As well as adding new game modes would be cool but of course this is just the first version of the game so not everything is finished.

So when I first saw this game I was very excited, but now I’m very disappointed. It looks cool but the second I get in the app my friend is always “offline” no matter what making it impossible to join them for both of us. Please fix this issue for I will be refunding this until this games actually works.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, we believe this is happening because you are in Invisible Mode. We recommend trying to turn it off by going to your Settings > Audience & Visibility > "Set Your Active Status" > "Show the app you're currently using" tab should be active.

If you continue to run into issues please reach out to our support team so they can troubleshoot with you: https://support.saber.games/hc/en-us/requests/new.

reviews.review_description: No option for private lobbies, can’t sit at a table and I can’t even join my friends. They’re online but the friends tab says they’re offline. Was really excited for this game too, but it’s awful.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, we believe this is happening because you are in Invisible Mode. We recommend trying to turn it off by going to your Settings > Audience & Visibility > "Set Your Active Status" > "Show the app you're currently using" tab should be active.

If you continue to run into issues please reach out to our support team so they can troubleshoot with you: https://support.saber.games/hc/en-us/requests/new.

Good game overall, but I can’t join any lobbies. It always says an error occurred. Try again later the next day I try again same thing I can’t do anything.

developer_response.body: Hi there, can you please reach out to our support team about this? They should be able to troubleshoot with you: https://support.saber.games/hc/en-us/requests/new

reviews.review_description: This game is very fun and good to play with friends. Just please add an atm so you can buy tickets. And did I see a review by vr central?!
it’s just amazing

reviews.review_title: Couldn't refund and it doesn't work
reviews.review_description: L game

developer_response.body: Hi there, we are sorry the game wasn't working for you. Can you please reach out to our support team so they can look into the problem you are encountering? https://support.saber.games/hc/en-us/requests/new

reviews.review_description: I would say it would be a good game if my voice chat was working

developer_response.body: Hi there, this is odd! Can you please send a ticket to our support team so we can investigate further? https://support.saber.games/hc/en-us/requests/new

reviews.review_description: Great social space, very clever fun game

Honestly, I don't see what all the negative views are about. I had no trouble with this "Invisible mode" or whatever because I merely turned it off in settings. Fun game, easy to play but feels a little empty. Like its exploding kittens and thats it. But it's only to be expected, the game has just released after all. There are a few minor glitches too but nothing too bad. 4/5 good game
